tasks.label: cmake-build
args: "D:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/Common7/Tools/VsDevCmd.bat" -arch=x64 && set PATH=C:\Qt\6.11.0\msvc2022_64\bin;%PATH% && "D:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/Common7/IDE/CommonExtensions/Microsoft/CMake/CMake/bin/cmake.exe" -S "${workspaceFolder}" -B "${workspaceFolder}/out/build/debug" -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=C:/Qt/6.11.0/msvc2022_64 && "D:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/Common7/IDE/CommonExtensions/Microsoft/CMake/CMake/bin/cmake.exe" --build "${workspaceFolder}/out/build/debug" --config Debug

tasks.label: cmake-clean-build
args: rmdir /s /q "${workspaceFolder}\out\build\debug" & "D:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/Common7/Tools/VsDevCmd.bat" -arch=x64 && set PATH=C:\Qt\6.11.0\msvc2022_64\bin;%PATH% && "D:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/Common7/IDE/CommonExtensions/Microsoft/CMake/CMake/bin/cmake.exe" -S "${workspaceFolder}" -B "${workspaceFolder}/out/build/debug" -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=C:/Qt/6.11.0/msvc2022_64 && "D:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/Common7/IDE/CommonExtensions/Microsoft/CMake/CMake/bin/cmake.exe" --build "${workspaceFolder}/out/build/debug" --config Debug
